category_sources: source_facts.description says library access to GnuPG; GnuPG official GPGME page describes it as a high-level crypto API for encryption, decryption, signing, verification, and key management.
display_name_sources: GnuPG official page title and content use GPGME; source_facts.name is gpgme.
docs_sources: GnuPG official GPGME page links to the manual; official manual is hosted under gnupg.org/documentation/manuals/gpgme.
repo_sources: GnuPG official Git access page says GnuPG and related projects are in public Git repositories under dev.gnupg.org/source; GPGME is an official related project on gnupg.org.
tags_sources: GnuPG GPGME page describes a high-level crypto API and GnuPG access library; source_facts.description says library access to GnuPG.
